auth.agreePdpl: I agree to the privacy policy (PDPL).

longCopy.mfaInstructions: Open your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code shown for Mandoob.
longCopy.recoveryCodesIntro: Save these one-time recovery codes somewhere safe. Each works exactly once if you lose your authenticator.
longCopy.passwordResetIntro: We will send a one-time link to the email registered on your account.
longCopy.resetSentNotice: If an account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way.
longCopy.checkInbox: Check your inbox (and spam). The code expires in 10 minutes.
longCopy.ifAccountExists: If an account exists for that email, we sent a reset link. Check your inbox.
longCopy.scanQrIntro: Scan the QR with an authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code.
longCopy.consentPdpl: I agree to the privacy policy and consent to processing of my personal data per UAE PDPL.

longCopy.welcomeIntro: Your registration, documents, renewals, and invoices at a glance.
longCopy.noOpenRequests: You have no open document requests right now.

longCopy.documentsIntro: Upload requested documents and track items already submitted.
longCopy.renewalsIntro: Trade license, visas, Emirates IDs, and Ejari renewals — past and upcoming.

longCopy.awaitingDescription: Items your PRO firm needs from you.

longCopy.recentCommsDescription: Latest messages between you and your PRO firm.
longCopy.uploadDialogDescription: PDF, JPEG, PNG, DOCX, or XLSX up to 25 MB. The file is scanned before storage.

longCopy.identityHelp: These details are kept private and only shared with your assigned PRO when required.

longCopy.identitySubtitle: Identity records ship in a later step.

contact.title: التواصل والشؤون القانونية

pro.label: التسمية
pro.newClientIntro: سجّل الأساسيات الآن — يمكن إدخال الرخصة والمساهمين والمستندات لاحقًا.
pro.newRenewalIntro: تُنشأ تجديدات الرخصة تلقائيًا من تاريخ انتهاء رخصة العميل. استخدم هذا النموذج للتأشيرات والهويات الإماراتية وإيجاري.

longCopy.uploadHelp: Allowed file types: PDF, JPG, PNG, DOCX, XLSX up to 25 MB.
longCopy.scanInProgress: We are scanning your file for viruses. This usually takes a few seconds.

longCopy.lateFineWarning: Some UAE authorities charge AED 25 per day after the deadline. Renew before the due date to avoid fines.
longCopy.ejariDeadlineNotice: Ejari must be renewed before submitting your trade-license renewal.

longCopy.invoiceFooter: All amounts are in UAE Dirham (AED) unless otherwise stated. VAT is included where applicable.
longCopy.refundPolicy: Refunds for cancelled registrations are processed within 7 business days to the original payment method.
longCopy.subscriptionExplainer: Your subscription renews automatically on the same day each month. Cancel any time before the next billing cycle.

longCopy.recordingConsent: By joining this meeting you consent to it being recorded and stored on your tenant workspace for compliance review.
longCopy.aiSummaryNotice: An AI summary will be generated after the meeting and shared with you and your PRO.

errors.couldNotResend: تعذر إعادة الإرسال. حاول مرة أخرى بعد قليل.

errors.questionnaireSubmitFailed: تعذّر إرسال الاستبيان. تحقق من اتصالك وحاول مرة أخرى.

longCopy.unexpected: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again, and contact support if the problem persists.
longCopy.uploadTooLarge: That file is larger than the 25 MB limit. Please compress it or upload it in smaller parts.
longCopy.rateLimited: You have made too many requests in a short time. Please wait a minute before trying again.
